Get list of all webhooks

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: {
            Result: {
              value:
                '[{\n    "webhookId": "webhook-id-1",\n    "name": "webhook-name",\n    "description": "optional-description",\n    "active": false,\n    "url": "https://test.example.com/webhooks",\n    "events": [\n        "*"\n    ],\n    "creationDate": "2022-08-19T12:57:09.092Z"\n},\n{\n    "webhookId": "webhook-id-2",\n    "name": "webhook-name",\n    "description": "optional-description",\n    "active": false,\n    "url": "https://test.example.com/webhooks",\n    "events": [\n        "*"\n    ],\n    "creationDate": "2022-08-19T12:57:09.092Z"\n}\n]',
            },
          },
          schema: {
            type: 'array',
            items: {
              type: 'object',
              properties: {
                webhookId: { type: 'string', example: 'webhook-id-1' },
                name: { type: 'string', example: 'webhook-name' },
                description: { type: 'string', example: 'optional-description' },
                active: { type: 'boolean', example: false, default: true },
                url: { type: 'string', example: 'https://test.example.com/webhooks' },
                events: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', example: '*' } },
                creationDate: { type: 'string', example: '2022-08-19T12:57:09.092Z' },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    '400': {
      description: '400',
      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
